signals: CHURNED ACCOUNT: Granola internal meeting notes from Mar 19, 2026 confirm 'Removed brands: Gains & Bulk (churned)' in MRR analysis. Listed as inactive in Mar 30 outreach review. Account was flagged as likely churn as early as Feb 23, 2026.

ZERO PLATFORM PERFORMANCE (7d): Apr 6-12 shows 27 sessions but $0 revenue, 0 purchases, 0 checkouts, 0% CVR. The only purchase in 45 days was a single $78 order on Mar 17, 2026. Platform is effectively abandoned.

COMPLETE COMMUNICATION BLACKOUT: Last brand Slack message from Raymond Stercl was Dec 30, 2025 -- 104 days ago. Zero emails found in the last 30 days. Pulkit joined the channel Feb 24, 2026 but never posted an intro message or any follow-up.
NO CALLS IN 90 DAYS: Last Glyphic call was Jan 13, 2026 (90 days ago) with Isabel O'Keefe (previous GM). Zero calls under current CSM Pulkit. Zero upcoming calendar events found.

GM TRANSITION FAILURE: Pulkit joined Slack channel on Feb 24, 2026 during GM transition from Isabel O'Keefe, but never initiated contact. Isabel's last substantive interaction was Jan 15, 2026. The account fell through the cracks during handoff.

CASH FLOW ISSUES NOTED: Granola meeting from Feb 9, 2026 noted 'finance declining payment flexibility ($28k MRR, $2.4k monthly)' and 'September renewal, rolling contract... Cash flow issues but contract obligations remain.'

ABANDONED GROWTH PLANS: Brand had ambitious 2026 plans discussed with Isabel in Jan 2026 -- $50M revenue target, doubled ad spend, Creatine Revolution campaign ($1+free shipping for Jan 31), AI Search trial, expanding beyond creatine. None materialized on FERMAT.

calls.analysis: Glyphic returned 10 calls (6 unique, plus duplicates from FERMAT Copilot recordings). All calls were with previous GMs -- Ryan Barry and Isabel O'Keefe. The most recent call was Jan 13, 2026 (90 days ago) with Isabel O'Keefe, Raymond Stercl, and Kaleb Mattice (25m 39s). Calls were biweekly Oct-Jan 2026, then ceased entirely. Zero calls under current CSM Pulkit Srivastava. Brand contacts are Raymond Stercl (raymond@gainsinbulk.com) and Kaleb Mattice (kaleb@gainsinbulk.com) at gainsinbulk.com.

calendar.analysis: Google Calendar returned 0 events for 'Gains In Bulk' in the Mar 14 - Jun 12, 2026 window. No past meetings, no upcoming syncs scheduled. This confirms complete disengagement -- the account was never activated under the current CSM after the Feb 24 transition.

messages.author: Isabel O'Keefe
messages.content: Recap of GiB 2026 plans call with Raymond Stercl: $50M revenue target with doubled ad spend, expanding beyond creatine (currently 90% of revenue) to Shape, Workout Candy, Testosterone Gain + new products. FERMAT use case: split testing educational/influencer-driven landing pages. Next steps: Raymond to re-sync Shopify data connector, send ClickFunnels page when ready, start using Pierre to build funnels. Isabel to share top-performing funnel examples, connect AR team with GiB accounting.

messages.content: Call recap: discussed Creatine Revolution campaign ($1 + free shipping), ongoing packaging work and site redesign, AI Search setup (already enabled), interest in testing Creatine Revolution page on FERMAT vs Webflow. Next steps shared for AI Search onboarding and AR team connection.

slack.analysis: The #fermat-x-gains-in-bulk channel is effectively dead. The last message from brand contact Raymond Stercl was Dec 30, 2025 (104 days ago). Pulkit joined the channel on Feb 24, 2026 as part of GM transition but never posted an intro message or any follow-up -- only a system 'joined' notification. The previous GM Isabel O'Keefe's last substantive interaction was Jan 15, 2026. Pierre bot weekly roundups stopped after Nov 24, 2025, indicating funnel activity dried up. The brand had ambitious 2026 plans ($50M revenue, Creatine Revolution, AI Search trial) that were never executed on FERMAT. Raymond had indicated he planned to move forward with AI Search and Creatine Revolution but was overwhelmed ('bunch on my plate').

email.analysis: Gmail search for 'Gains In Bulk newer_than:30d' returned 0 results. No email correspondence with Gains In Bulk contacts (Raymond Stercl, Kaleb Mattice) in the last 30 days. This confirms the complete communication blackout across all channels.
